summary: Iteration 104: Frontend Testing - Enter Key Sequential Navigation in Transaction Form (v40.0.0). All features tested and working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: TransactionFormDialog.jsx: FIELD_ORDER array correctly defines navigation sequence
focusNextField utility properly skips hidden fields (manual-party-type when not visible)
enterNav handler correctly prevents form submission and moves focus
handleCategoryKeyDown properly distinguishes between suggestion selection (ArrowDown+Enter) and navigation (Enter only)
RoundOffInput.jsx correctly accepts and passes onKeyDown prop
WhatsNew.jsx APP_VERSION correctly set to '40.0.0' with v40 changelog
context_for_next_testing_agent: v40.0.0 Enter key navigation feature fully tested and working. All navigation flows verified: Date->Category->Amount->Description->Reference->RoundOff->SaveButton. Category suggestion dropdown behavior verified: ArrowDown+Enter selects suggestion (stays on field), Enter without selection navigates to next field.

enter_key_navigation_date_to_category.details: Pressing Enter on Date field moves focus to Category field

enter_key_navigation_category_to_amount.details: Pressing Enter on Category field (without suggestion selected) moves focus to Amount field

enter_key_navigation_amount_to_descripti.details: Pressing Enter on Amount field moves focus to Description field

enter_key_navigation_description_to_refe.details: Pressing Enter on Description field moves focus to Reference field

enter_key_navigation_reference_to_roundo.details: Pressing Enter on Reference field moves focus to Round Off field

enter_key_navigation_roundoff_to_save.details: Pressing Enter on Round Off field moves focus to Save button

category_suggestion_arrowdown_enter.details: ArrowDown highlights suggestion, Enter selects it (does NOT navigate to next field)

category_enter_without_suggestion.details: Enter without highlighted suggestion navigates to Amount field

form_no_submit_on_enter.details: Form does NOT submit when pressing Enter on input fields (only submits on Save button)

version_v40_in_header.details: v40.0.0 badge visible in header toolbar

whats_new_dialog_v40.details: What's New dialog shows v40.0.0 as latest version with Enter Navigation changelog

cashbook_functionality.details: Cash Book tab loads correctly, transactions displayed, filter controls working

console_warnings: Warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - Minor accessibility warning, not blocking
